events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the fault is an O/B reversing-valve configuration mismatch — the thermostat/board is set for the wrong energization convention (O = energized-in-cool vs B = energized-in-heat), causing the heat pump to produce heat on a cooling call. Flagged as `fail` / `high` risk with corrective steps to verify the valve's actual energization type, correct the O/B setting, and confirm proper operation in both modes.
